name: example-skyelite-private-jets
title: SkyElite Private Jets

title_i18n.zh-CN: SkyElite 私人飞机 — 高端落地页 Hero
title_i18n.zh-TW: SkyElite 私人飛機 — 高端落地頁 Hero

description: Premium private-jet landing hero: a fullscreen autoplay CloudFront video background, a max-w-7xl nav with a Lucide hamburger mobile dropdown, and a centered overlapping two-line headline (Premium. / Accessible.) with Discover + Book Now pill CTAs.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 高端私人飞机落地页 Hero：全屏自动播放的 CloudFront 视频背景、max-w-7xl 导航栏配 Lucide 汉堡菜单移动端下拉，以及居中重叠的双行标题（Premium. / Accessible.）和 Discover + Book Now 胶囊按钮。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 高端私人飛機落地頁 Hero：全螢幕自動播放的 CloudFront 影片背景、max-w-7xl 導覽列配 Lucide 漢堡選單行動版下拉，以及置中重疊的雙行標題（Premium. / Accessible.）和 Discover + Book Now 膠囊按鈕。
description_i18n.ja: プレミアムなプライベートジェットのランディングヒーロー。全画面で自動再生される CloudFront の動画背景、max-w-7xl のナビと Lucide のハンバーガー式モバイルドロップダウン、中央で重なる2行の見出し（Premium. / Accessible.）、そして Discover + Book Now のピル型CTAを備えます。
description_i18n.ko: 프리미엄 프라이빗 제트 랜딩 히어로: 전체 화면 자동 재생되는 CloudFront 영상 배경, Lucide 햄버거 모바일 드롭다운이 있는 max-w-7xl 내비게이션, 그리고 가운데에서 겹치는 두 줄 헤드라인(Premium. / Accessible.)과 Discover + Book Now 알약형 CTA를 담았습니다.
description_i18n.de: Premium-Hero für Privatjets: ein Vollbild-CloudFront-Video als automatisch abspielender Hintergrund, eine max-w-7xl-Navigation mit Lucide-Hamburger-Dropdown für Mobilgeräte sowie eine zentrierte, überlappende zweizeilige Überschrift (Premium. / Accessible.) mit Discover- und Book-Now-Pill-CTAs.
description_i18n.fr: Hero d'atterrissage premium pour jet privé : une vidéo CloudFront en plein écran en lecture automatique en arrière-plan, une navigation max-w-7xl avec menu déroulant mobile hamburger Lucide, et un titre centré sur deux lignes qui se chevauchent (Premium. / Accessible.) avec des CTA pilule Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.ru: Премиальная hero-секция лендинга частных самолётов: полноэкранное автозапускаемое видео CloudFront в фоне, навигация max-w-7xl с мобильным выпадающим меню-гамбургером Lucide и центрированный двухстрочный заголовок с наложением (Premium. / Accessible.) и кнопками-таблетками Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.es: Hero de landing premium para jets privados: un fondo de vídeo CloudFront a pantalla completa con reproducción automática, una navegación max-w-7xl con menú desplegable móvil de hamburguesa Lucide y un titular centrado de dos líneas superpuestas (Premium. / Accessible.) con CTA tipo píldora Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Hero de landing premium para jatos particulares: um fundo de vídeo CloudFront em tela cheia com reprodução automática, uma navegação max-w-7xl com menu dropdown mobile de hambúrguer Lucide e um título centralizado de duas linhas sobrepostas (Premium. / Accessible.) com CTAs em formato de pílula Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.it: Hero di landing premium per jet privati: uno sfondo video CloudFront a schermo intero in riproduzione automatica, una nav max-w-7xl con menu a tendina mobile a hamburger Lucide e un titolo centrato su due righe sovrapposte (Premium. / Accessible.) con CTA a pillola Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.vi: Hero trang đích cao cấp cho máy bay phản lực riêng: nền video CloudFront toàn màn hình tự động phát, thanh điều hướng max-w-7xl với menu thả xuống dạng hamburger Lucide cho di động, cùng tiêu đề hai dòng chồng lên nhau căn giữa (Premium. / Accessible.) và các CTA dạng viên thuốc Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.pl: Premium hero landingu prywatnych odrzutowców: pełnoekranowe automatycznie odtwarzane wideo CloudFront w tle, nawigacja max-w-7xl z mobilnym rozwijanym menu hamburgerowym Lucide oraz wyśrodkowany, nachodzący na siebie dwuwierszowy nagłówek (Premium. / Accessible.) z przyciskami CTA w kształcie pigułki Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.id: Hero landing premium untuk jet pribadi: latar belakang video CloudFront layar penuh yang diputar otomatis, navigasi max-w-7xl dengan dropdown hamburger Lucide untuk seluler, dan judul dua baris yang saling tumpang-tindih di tengah (Premium. / Accessible.) dengan CTA berbentuk pil Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.nl: Premium hero-landing voor privéjets: een automatisch afspelende CloudFront-video op het volledige scherm als achtergrond, een max-w-7xl-navigatie met een Lucide-hamburgermenu voor mobiel en een gecentreerde, overlappende tweeregelige kop (Premium. / Accessible.) met Discover- en Book Now-pill-CTA's.
description_i18n.ar: قسم رئيسي فاخر لصفحة هبوط طائرات خاصة: خلفية فيديو CloudFront بملء الشاشة تعمل تلقائيًا، وشريط تنقّل بعرض max-w-7xl مع قائمة منسدلة للجوال بأيقونة همبرغر من Lucide، وعنوان من سطرين متراكبين في المنتصف (Premium. / Accessible.) مع أزرار CTA بشكل كبسولة Discover و Book Now.
description_i18n.tr: Özel jetler için premium açılış hero'su: tam ekran otomatik oynatılan CloudFront video arka planı, mobil için Lucide hamburger açılır menüsüne sahip max-w-7xl gezinme ve ortalanmış, üst üste binen iki satırlık başlık (Premium. / Accessible.) ile Discover + Book Now hap biçimli CTA'lar.
description_i18n.uk: Преміальна hero-секція лендингу приватних літаків: повноекранне відео CloudFront, що автоматично відтворюється у фоні, навігація max-w-7xl з мобільним випадним меню-гамбургером Lucide та центрований дворядковий заголовок із накладанням (Premium. / Accessible.) і кнопки-пігулки Discover + Book Now.
description_i18n.en: Premium private-jet landing hero: a fullscreen autoplay CloudFront video background, a max-w-7xl nav with a Lucide hamburger mobile dropdown, and a centered overlapping two-line headline (Premium. / Accessible.) with Discover + Book Now pill CTAs.

query.en:
Create a premium private jet landing page hero section with the following specifications:

Video Background:
Use this exact CloudFront video URL: https://plugin-assets.open-design.ai/plugins/skyelite-private-jets/hf_20260328_091828_e240eb17-6edc-4129-ad9d-98678e3fd238-86655b.mp4
Video should autoplay, be muted, loop continuously, and include playsInline attribute
Video covers entire viewport (100vh) using object-cover

Navigation Bar:
Brand name "SkyElite" on the left (text-2xl, font-semibold, text-gray-900)
Desktop menu items (hidden on mobile, visible md:flex): Start, Story, Rates, Benefits, FAQ
Navigation links in gray-900 with hover:text-gray-700 transition
Mobile hamburger menu button using Lucide React icons (Menu/X)
Mobile menu appears as dropdown with white/95 opacity background, backdrop blur, rounded corners, shadow
Max width 7xl, centered with px-8 py-6

Hero Content (centered, -mt-80 to pull up):
Small uppercase label: "PRIVATE JETS" (text-sm, font-semibold, gray-600, tracking-wider, mb-4)
Large two-line heading with overlapping effect:
Line 1: "Premium." (text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl, font-normal, text-gray-500, leading-none, tracking-tighter)
Line 2: "Accessible." (same size, color: #202A36, negative margin-top: -12px for overlap)
Subtitle: "Your dedication deserves recognition." (text-lg md:text-xl, gray-600, mb-6, max-w-2xl)
Two call-to-action buttons (gap-4, centered):
"Discover" button: px-4 py-2, rounded-full, bg-gray-300, text-gray-800, font-medium, hover:bg-gray-400
"Book Now" button: px-4 py-2, rounded-full, white text, bg-color #202A36, hover color #1a2229 with smooth transitions

Typography:
Use Inter font (import from Google Fonts: 400, 500, 600, 700 weights)
Apply to entire body via CSS

Technical Setup:
React with TypeScript
Tailwind CSS for styling
Lucide React for icons
useState hook for mobile menu toggle
Full screen height container (h-screen)
Responsive breakpoints: mobile-first, md, lg
All transitions use transition-colors class

Layout Structure:
Outer container: min-h-screen, bg-gray-50
Hero section: relative, h-screen, overflow-hidden
Content wrapper: relative, h-full, flex flex-col
Main content area: flex-1, flex items-center justify-center

Make it clean, modern, and premium-looking with smooth interactions.

A complete single-file reference implementation ships beside this plugin at example.html — match its tokens, video URL, nav, overlapping headline, and responsive behavior. Keep the CloudFront video URL exactly as given (it is a large stable CDN asset and stays remote). Do not introduce any remote avatar hosts.
query.zh-CN: 高端私人飞机落地页 Hero（全屏 CloudFront 视频背景、Lucide 汉堡菜单、重叠双行标题、Discover/Book Now 胶囊按钮）。完整规格以 en 字段为准，并以随附的 example.html 为保真锚点。
